# Proverbs 2

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-INDEX (verse table + nav; auto-generated — safe to regenerate) -->

↑ [Proverbs](../README.md)  ·  [‹ Proverbs 1](../Proverbs-01/README.md)  ·  [Proverbs 3 ›](../Proverbs-03/README.md)

📖 **Full text:** [BBE](BBE.md) · [WEB](WEB.md) · [KJV](KJV.md) · [ASV](ASV.md)

## Verses (22)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | My son, if you will take my words to your heart, storing up my laws in your mind; | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | So that your ear gives attention to wisdom, and your heart is turned to knowledge; | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Truly, if you are crying out for good sense, and your request is for knowledge; | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | If you are looking for her as for silver, and searching for her as for stored-up wealth; | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Then the fear of the Lord will be clear to you, and knowledge of God will be yours. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | For the Lord gives wisdom; out of his mouth come knowledge and reason: | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | He has salvation stored up for the upright, he is a breastplate to those in whom there is no evil; | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | He keeps watch on the ways which are right, and takes care of those who have the fear of him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Then you will have knowledge of righteousness and right acting, and upright behaviour, even of every good way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | For wisdom will come into your heart, and knowledge will be pleasing to your soul; | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Wise purposes will be watching over you, and knowledge will keep you; | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Giving you salvation from the evil man, from those whose words are false; | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Who give up the way of righteousness, to go by dark roads; | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | Who take pleasure in wrongdoing, and have joy in the evil designs of the sinner; | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Whose ways are not straight, and whose footsteps are turned to evil: | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | To take you out of the power of the strange woman, who says smooth words with her tongue; | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | Who is false to the husband of her early years, and does not keep the agreement of her God in mind: | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | For her house is on the way down to death; her footsteps go down to the shades: | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Those who go to her do not come back again; their feet do not keep in the ways of life: | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | So that you may go in the way of good men, and keep in the footsteps of the upright. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | For the upright will be living in the land, and the good will have it for their heritage. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | But sinners will be cut off from the land, and those whose acts are false will be uprooted. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
